---
applyTo: "**"
---

Provide coding guidelines that AI should follow when generating code, answering questions, or reviewing changes.

- Always adhere to these rules unless explicitly instructed otherwise.
- Always implement modular solutions with clear separation of concerns.
- Always implement clean and best practices for code.
- Evaluate twice apply once.
- Manage complexity by breaking down problems into smaller, manageable parts.
- Favor readability and maintainability in all code.
- Don't duplicate code.
- Remove any dead or unused code.
- Remove unwanted or debugging statements.
- Use meaningful names for variables, functions, and classes.
